references.title: The 27 Best Supplements & Vitamins for Hair, Skin and Nails 2026
The 9 Best Vitamins for Hair, Skin, and Nails

en.commentary: Nutrafol Core for Women stays my number one because it is still the only pick here built on published clinical results rather than a single high-dose vitamin. The latest 2026 roundups keep naming it best overall, and that reflects what the formula actually targets, the stress, hormone, and nutrition factors tied to thinning, which is a more honest approach than piling on biotin. The trade-off is price and a four-capsule daily dose, so I score its value and format accordingly. Right behind it, HUM Hair Sweet Hair holds second as the friendlier gummy option that people actually stick with, and consistency is where most hair supplements win or lose. Thorne Biotin-8 keeps third and remains my clean-label value call, and it is worth repeating what dermatologists keep saying, biotin mainly helps people who are genuinely deficient, so set expectations there. Vital Proteins Beauty Edition holds fourth for the collagen-and-skin crowd, and MaryRuth's rounds out the top five with a gentle, well-tested formula. Down the list, Olly and Nature's Bounty keep their spots on format and price for buyers who want an easy daily habit without spending much. The evidence this month supports the existing order, so I am holding it and letting ingredient quality and testing lead. This is general wellness information, not medical advice, so check with a clinician if you are managing hair loss.

highlights.title: Nutrafol leads on real evidence
highlights.body: Published clinical results and a whole-body approach to thinning keep it first, well ahead of single high-dose biotin pills.

highlights.title: Consistency favors HUM
highlights.body: A gummy people actually keep taking earns second, because adherence is where most hair supplements succeed or fail.

highlights.title: Set honest biotin expectations
highlights.body: Thorne Biotin-8 is a clean value pick, but dermatologists note biotin mainly helps those who are genuinely deficient.

highlights.title: Collagen and gentle formulas covered
highlights.body: Vital Proteins targets skin and collagen while MaryRuth's offers a well-tested, gentle option in the top five.

zh-tw.commentary: Nutrafol Core for Women 這週還是我的第一，因為它到現在仍是這份清單裡唯一建立在已發表臨床結果上的選擇，而不是靠單一高劑量維生素撐場面。2026 最新的評測整理也持續把它列為綜合最佳，這反映的是配方真正在對付的東西，也就是跟掉髮有關的壓力、荷爾蒙跟營養因素，比一味堆生物素誠實多了。代價是價格跟一天四顆的用量，所以它的 CP 值跟服用便利性分數我照這個給。緊追在後的 HUM Hair Sweet Hair 守住第二，是比較好入口、大家真的吃得下去的軟糖選擇，而穩定持續正是頭髮補給品成敗的關鍵。Thorne Biotin-8 守住第三，依舊是我推薦的乾淨標籤高 CP 值款，這裡也要再講一次皮膚科醫師一直提醒的，生物素主要幫得上真的缺乏的人，期待值要抓對。Vital Proteins Beauty Edition 守住第四，適合重視膠原蛋白跟皮膚的人，MaryRuth's 則以溫和、檢測完整的配方守住前五。往下的 Olly 跟 Nature's Bounty 靠形式跟價格守位，適合想要輕鬆養成每天習慣又不想花太多的人。這個月的證據支持現有順序，所以我維持不動，讓成分品質跟檢測帶頭。這是一般保健資訊，不是醫療建議，正在處理掉髮問題請先諮詢醫師。

highlights.title: Nutrafol 靠真證據領先
highlights.body: 已發表臨床結果加上對掉髮的全身性思路，讓它穩坐第一，遠勝單一高劑量生物素。

highlights.title: 能持續吃的 HUM 佔優
highlights.body: 大家真的吃得下去的軟糖拿下第二，因為能不能持續吃正是頭髮補給品的成敗關鍵。

highlights.title: 生物素期待值要抓對
highlights.body: Thorne Biotin-8 是乾淨的高 CP 值款，但皮膚科醫師提醒生物素主要幫得上真的缺乏的人。

highlights.title: 膠原跟溫和配方都顧到
highlights.body: Vital Proteins 針對皮膚跟膠原，MaryRuth's 以檢測完整的溫和配方守住前五。

en.commentary: This category rewards evidence over label hype, and my board is ranked on what actually has data behind it. Nutrafol Core for Women stays first because it is the one product here built around a real multi-ingredient approach, blending saw palmetto, marine collagen, ashwagandha, a tocotrienol complex, and biotin, and it is backed by studies showing improvement in women with self-perceived thinning. That is a stronger foundation than a single-vitamin megadose, which is why it holds the top spot. The reviewer chorus this month is worth repeating: biotin gets top billing on a lot of labels, but a clinical review found it does little for hair if you are not actually deficient. So I weight formulas by whether the whole stack does work, not by how much biotin is on the panel. Hum Hair Sweet Hair keeps second for its easy gummy format and solid testing, and Thorne Biotin-8 holds third as the clean, verified pick when you genuinely are low on biotin. Nothing reformulated this week, so I held scores steady. Buy Nutrafol if you want the evidence-led route, and remember the honest truth: these help most when they fill a real deficiency, so temper expectations if your diet is already solid.

highlights.title: Nutrafol earns first on a real formula
highlights.body: A genuine multi-ingredient blend of saw palmetto, marine collagen, ashwagandha, tocotrienols, and biotin, backed by studies in women with self-perceived thinning. Stronger than any single-vitamin megadose.

highlights.title: Biotin is oversold on labels
highlights.body: A clinical review found biotin does little for hair unless you are actually deficient. I rank on whether the whole stack works, not on how big the biotin number is.

highlights.title: Hum and Thorne cover format and purity
highlights.body: Hum Hair Sweet Hair holds second on easy gummy format and solid testing. Thorne Biotin-8 is third, the clean verified pick for people who genuinely run low on biotin.

highlights.title: Set honest expectations
highlights.body: These supplements help most when they fill a real gap. If your diet is already solid, temper what you expect, and choose the evidence-led formula rather than the flashiest label.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個類別看的是證據，不是包裝上的話術，我榜單就是照真的有數據撐腰的來排。Nutrafol Core 女性版繼續第一，因為它是這裡面唯一圍繞真正的多成分策略做的產品，鋸棕櫚、海洋膠原、南非醉茄、生育三烯酚複方加生物素全放進去，還有針對自覺髮量變稀女性的研究支持。這個基礎比單一維生素灌大劑量紮實多了，所以它守住第一。這個月評測講的一句話值得再提：很多產品把生物素擺在最顯眼的位置，但臨床回顧發現，你沒有真的缺乏的話，生物素對頭髮幫助很有限。所以我評分是看整組配方有沒有用，不是看成分表上生物素數字多大。Hum Hair Sweet Hair 守第二，軟糖好吃好吞、檢驗也紮實。Thorne Biotin-8 守第三，是你真的缺生物素時那個乾淨、可驗證的選擇。這禮拜沒有產品改配方，所以我分數維持不動。想走實證路線就買 Nutrafol，然後記住一個實話：這些東西補的是真正的缺口才最有感，你飲食本來就均衡的話，期待值放低一點。

highlights.title: Nutrafol 靠真配方拿第一
highlights.body: 鋸棕櫚、海洋膠原、南非醉茄、生育三烯酚加生物素的真多成分配方，還有針對自覺髮量變稀女性的研究支持。比單一維生素灌大劑量紮實。

highlights.title: 生物素在標籤上被過度吹捧
highlights.body: 臨床回顧發現，你沒真的缺乏的話生物素對頭髮幫助有限。我評分看整組配方有沒有用，不是看生物素數字多大。

highlights.title: Hum 跟 Thorne 分別顧劑型跟純度
highlights.body: Hum Hair Sweet Hair 守第二，軟糖好吞、檢驗紮實。Thorne Biotin-8 第三，是你真的缺生物素時那個乾淨、可驗證的選擇。

highlights.title: 期待值放實在一點
highlights.body: 這些補充品補的是真正的缺口才最有感。你飲食本來就均衡，期待就放低一點，挑實證配方，別挑標籤最花俏的。

references.title: Nutrafol Hair Review 2026 | Tested by Experts

en.commentary: Nutrafol Core for Women keeps my top ranking, and the case for it is the evidence: a physician-formulated blend of 21 actives including Sensoril ashwagandha and marine collagen peptides that targets the stress, inflammation, and nutrient gaps behind thinning hair. Testers this year reported no shedding, no stomach upset, and steady results, which is exactly what earns its high efficacy and dosage marks. The one real drawback is four capsules a day, so the format score stays honest. HUM Hair Sweet Hair holds second as the gummy that makes consistency easy, and easy consistency is what actually moves results over months. Thorne Biotin-8 sits third and remains my pick when third-party purity leads your decision, since it posts the highest testing score here and comes at a friendly price. Vital Proteins Beauty Edition is the collagen-forward option I recommend for anyone who wants skin and nail support alongside hair, and its efficacy holds up well. MaryRuth's and Olly round out the accessible tier with clean formulas and easy formats for people who dislike large pills. Down the board, Sports Research, Nature's Bounty, and Nature Made deliver the value story, dependable biotin-centric formulas at drugstore prices that suit a simple daily routine. My guidance this week: Nutrafol if you want the most complete clinical formula, Thorne if purity testing is your priority, and a gummy like HUM or Olly if swallowing capsules is the thing that trips you up. The order held, and these ten cover every budget and preference worth considering now.

highlights.title: Nutrafol leads on evidence
highlights.body: A physician-formulated 21-active blend with Sensoril ashwagandha and marine collagen targets the root causes of thinning, earning the top efficacy score.

highlights.title: Thorne wins on purity
highlights.body: Biotin-8 posts the highest third-party testing score here at a friendly price, my pick when clean sourcing leads the decision.

highlights.title: Gummies make consistency easy
highlights.body: HUM Hair Sweet Hair and Olly deliver clean formulas in easy formats, and steady daily use is what actually moves results.

highlights.title: Drugstore value holds up
highlights.body: Sports Research, Nature's Bounty, and Nature Made offer dependable biotin-centric formulas at accessible prices for a simple routine.

zh-tw.commentary: Nutrafol Core 女性版繼續拿我的第一。它是醫師配方，21 種活性成分含 Sensoril 南非醉茄跟海洋膠原胜肽，針對壓力、發炎跟營養缺口這些掉髮背後的原因下手。今年實測者回報沒爆掉髮、沒腸胃不適、效果穩定推進，對得上它高分的功效跟劑量。唯一實在的缺點是一天要吞四顆，形式分數就照實給。HUM Hair Sweet Hair 排第二，軟糖讓你比較吃得下去、比較能持之以恆。Thorne Biotin-8 排第三，重視第三方純度檢驗它就是首選，檢測分數最高、價格親切。Vital Proteins 美肌版主打膠原，想同時照顧皮膚跟指甲的人我推它。MaryRuth's 跟 Olly 補齊入門段。Sports Research、Nature's Bounty、Nature Made 是性價比擔當，開架價提供穩定生物素配方。這週建議：想要最完整臨床配方選 Nutrafol，重視純度選 Thorne，怕吞膠囊就挑軟糖。

highlights.title: Nutrafol 靠證據領先
highlights.body: 醫師配方 21 種活性成分，含 Sensoril 南非醉茄跟海洋膠原，針對掉髮根源，功效分數全榜最高。

highlights.title: Thorne 純度取勝
highlights.body: Biotin-8 的第三方檢測分數最高、價格又親切，重視乾淨來源時它是我的首選。

highlights.title: 軟糖讓人吃得下去
highlights.body: HUM 跟 Olly 配方乾淨、形式好入口，天天吃得下去才是真正影響效果的關鍵。

highlights.title: 開架款性價比穩
highlights.body: Sports Research、Nature's Bounty、Nature Made 用開架價提供穩定生物素配方，適合簡單日常。

references.title: Nutrafol Hair Review 2026 | Tested by Experts
The Best Hair Growth Products (2026) Tested and Reviewed

en.commentary: Nutrafol Core stays my top pick, and the 2026 testing keeps validating it. This is the supplement with published clinical data showing increased hair thickness and reduced shedding, and its twenty-one-ingredient blend of ashwagandha, marine collagen and a tocotrienol complex targets the hormonal and stress drivers behind thinning rather than dosing biotin alone. Reviewers this cycle noted smooth, tasteless capsules that did not upset digestion, which matters for something you take four a day. The honest limit is that it suits mild to moderate thinning, so set expectations there. HUM Hair Sweet Hair keeps second as the gummy-friendly pick that people actually stick with, and adherence is half the battle with beauty supplements. Thorne Biotin-8 holds third for anyone who wants a clean, single-nutrient dose with Thorne's purity testing behind it. Vital Proteins Beauty Edition stays fourth by folding collagen into the routine for people already sold on collagen powders. MaryRuth's and OLLY carry the gentle-format, good-value middle, and Sports Research and Nature's Bounty remain the budget biotin staples that do the basics well. My advice this month is steady. If shedding is your real concern and budget allows, Nutrafol earns the spend. If you mainly want stronger nails and a supportive daily habit, a well-dosed biotin like Thorne delivers most of the value for far less.

highlights.title: Nutrafol for real shedding
highlights.body: Published clinical data on thickness and shedding, plus a blend that targets hormonal and stress drivers, justify the premium.

highlights.title: HUM wins on adherence
highlights.body: A gummy people actually keep taking, and consistency is half the result with beauty supplements.

highlights.title: Thorne for a clean dose
highlights.body: A single-nutrient biotin with third-party purity testing delivers most of the nail benefit for far less.

highlights.title: Set the right expectation
highlights.body: These support mild to moderate thinning, so pair them with patience and a consistent routine.

zh-tw.commentary: Nutrafol Core 依然是我的第一名，2026 年的測試也持續驗證。這款有公開臨床數據，顯示能增加髮量密度、減少掉髮，二十一種成分裡有南非醉茄、海洋膠原跟生育三烯酚複方，針對的是造成稀疏背後的荷爾蒙跟壓力因素，從根源著手。這一輪評測也提到膠囊滑順無味、不刺激腸胃，這點很重要，畢竟一天要吞四顆。老實講它的極限是適合輕度到中度稀疏，期待值先擺在這。HUM Hair Sweet Hair 排第二，是軟糖派裡大家真的願意持續吃的那款，保健品有吃完才有效，能堅持就贏一半。Thorne Biotin-8 第三，適合想要單一成分、乾淨劑量，又信得過 Thorne 純度檢驗的人。Vital Proteins Beauty Edition 第四，把膠原折進日常，適合本來就在喝膠原粉的人。MaryRuth's 跟 OLLY 撐起溫和好入口、性價比不錯的中段，Sports Research 跟 Nature's Bounty 則是把基本盤做好的平價生物素常青款。這個月我的建議很穩。掉髮是你真正的困擾、預算又夠，Nutrafol 花得值得。若你主要想要指甲更硬、養個好習慣，像 Thorne 這種劑量足的生物素花小錢就能拿到大部分好處。

highlights.title: 真的在掉髮就選 Nutrafol
highlights.body: 有公開臨床數據佐證髮量與掉髮，配方針對荷爾蒙與壓力因素，貴得有道理。

highlights.title: HUM 贏在能堅持
highlights.body: 大家真的願意持續吃的軟糖，保健品能持續就贏一半。

highlights.title: Thorne 給乾淨劑量
highlights.body: 單一成分、第三方純度檢驗的生物素，花小錢就拿到大部分護甲好處。

highlights.title: 先擺對期待值
highlights.body: 這類產品適合輕度到中度稀疏，要搭配耐心跟穩定的作息。

references.title: Nutrafol Hair Review 2026 | Tested by Experts

en.commentary: Nutrafol Core for Women keeps my top spot, and the reviews landing this month keep reinforcing why. Its blend of 21 vitamins, minerals, and botanicals like ashwagandha, marine collagen peptides, and tocotrienols is built around the whole-body drivers of hair health rather than a single vitamin, and the clinical backing for reduced shedding and improved thickness over three to six months is the strongest evidence story in the category. That is what earns the top score, even at a premium price. Right behind it, the HUM Hair Sweet Hair gummy stays my number two because it makes daily consistency effortless, and consistency is what actually delivers results with these supplements. Thorne Biotin-8 holds third as my pick for anyone who wants a clean, rigorously tested single-ingredient option, and this week's biotin coverage is a good reminder that biotin is water-soluble and safe even at higher doses. Vital Proteins Beauty Edition rounds out the top tier for the collagen-first crowd. Down the value end, Sports Research Biotin and Nature's Bounty remain the smart budget picks, covering the basics without the premium markup. My guidance for July is unchanged: decide whether you want a comprehensive multi-pathway formula or a targeted single ingredient, always check for third-party testing, and pick a format you will take every day for at least three months. Results here come from patience, not from any one hero ingredient.

highlights.title: Nutrafol holds number one
highlights.body: A 21-ingredient whole-body formula with the strongest clinical backing for reduced shedding and improved thickness keeps it my top pick.

highlights.title: HUM makes consistency easy
highlights.body: A daily gummy that people actually keep taking, and consistency is what delivers real results with these supplements.

highlights.title: Thorne Biotin-8 for clean testing
highlights.body: A rigorously third-party-tested single-ingredient option, and biotin stays safe even at higher doses since it is water-soluble.

highlights.title: Budget picks cover the basics
highlights.body: Sports Research Biotin and Nature's Bounty deliver the essentials without the premium markup for cost-conscious buyers.

zh-tw.commentary: Nutrafol Core for Women 繼續坐我的第一，這個月陸續出爐的評測也一直在幫它背書。它把 21 種維生素、礦物質，加上南非醉茄、海洋膠原蛋白胜肽、生育三烯酚這些植物成分，做成一套針對全身性頭髮健康驅動因子的配方，而不是只靠單一維生素，三到六個月能減少掉髮、增加髮量的臨床佐證，是這個類別裡最強的證據故事。這就是它就算價位偏高也能拿最高分的原因。緊跟在後的 HUM Hair Sweet Hair 軟糖穩坐我的第二，因為它讓每天持續變得毫不費力，而持續正是這類保健品真正見效的關鍵。Thorne Biotin-8 守住第三，是我推給想要乾淨、檢測嚴謹的單一成分選擇的人的那款，這週的生物素報導剛好提醒大家，生物素是水溶性的，就算劑量高一點也安全。Vital Proteins Beauty Edition 收尾第一梯隊，主打膠原蛋白優先的族群。往性價比那端走，Sports Research Biotin 跟 Nature's Bounty 還是聰明的預算選擇，把基本盤顧好又不用付高價溢價。七月我的建議沒變，先決定你要的是多路徑的全面配方，還是針對性的單一成分，一定要看有沒有第三方檢測，然後挑一個你至少能連吃三個月的劑型。這裡的成效靠的是耐心，不是靠哪一個明星成分。

highlights.title: Nutrafol 守住第一
highlights.body: 21 種成分的全身性配方，加上減少掉髮、增加髮量最強的臨床佐證，繼續是我的首選。

highlights.title: HUM 讓持續變簡單
highlights.body: 一款大家真的會每天吃的軟糖，而持續正是這類保健品真正見效的關鍵。

highlights.title: Thorne Biotin-8 檢測乾淨
highlights.body: 第三方檢測嚴謹的單一成分選擇，生物素是水溶性的，劑量高一點也安全。

highlights.title: 平價款顧好基本盤
highlights.body: Sports Research Biotin 跟 Nature's Bounty 把必需成分顧好，又不用付高價溢價，適合精打細算的人。

references.title: The 27 Best Supplements & Vitamins for Hair, Skin and Nails 2026 That Actually Work
These skin, hair and nail supplements can come with 'significant risks,' dermatologists warn
8 Best Vitamins for Healthy Hair, Skin, and Nails

en.commentary:
Collagen peptides earned a promotion this week. Work published in the International Journal of Molecular Sciences supports collagen peptides taken as a dietary supplement for promoting hair growth, which adds to the existing evidence base for skin elasticity and nail strength. That is three separate endpoints with published support behind one ingredient, and it moves Vital Proteins Beauty Edition to third with efficacy up to 9.0 and an overall 8.8.

Nutrafol Core for Women stays at the top and I do not see that changing soon. It is the only formula here designed by physicians and studied clinically in the specific population it targets, women aged 18 to 44 experiencing thinning. Four capsules a day is a real commitment and the price is the highest on this list, which is why its value score sits at 7.6. Everything else about it earns the first place slot.

The caution worth repeating: dermatologists interviewed this year keep pointing out that high dose biotin interferes with common lab assays, including thyroid and troponin tests. If you take a 5,000mcg or 10,000mcg biotin product, tell your doctor before bloodwork. That is a practical reason I keep favouring formulas with sensible dosing over the highest number on the label.

Thorne Biotin 8 drops to fourth on the same logic, though its 9.6 testing score keeps it the safest pick for anyone who wants a verified single ingredient. Hum Hair Sweet Hair holds second because the gummy format means people actually finish the bottle, and a supplement taken daily for six months beats a better formula abandoned in week three.

highlights.title: Vital Proteins moves to third
highlights.body: Efficacy rises to 9.0 on published work in the International Journal of Molecular Sciences supporting collagen peptides for hair growth, alongside the established evidence for skin elasticity and nail strength.

highlights.title: Nutrafol keeps first on clinical grounding
highlights.body: It is physician formulated and studied in its target population, women aged 18 to 44 with thinning hair. The four capsule daily dose and premium price keep value at 7.6, and everything else justifies the top spot.

highlights.title: Tell your doctor about high dose biotin
highlights.body: Dermatologists continue to flag that 5,000mcg and 10,000mcg biotin doses interfere with common lab assays including thyroid and troponin tests. Mention it before any bloodwork.

highlights.title: Thorne stays the verification pick
highlights.body: A 9.6 on third party testing makes it the choice for anyone who wants one well documented ingredient with a clean certificate of analysis behind it, at a value score of 9.2.

highlights.title: Adherence beats formulation
highlights.body: Hum Hair Sweet Hair holds second largely on its 9.2 format score. Six months of consistent daily use produces visible results, and a gummy people enjoy taking gets finished.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週膠原蛋白胜肽升等了。發表在 International Journal of Molecular Sciences 的研究，支持把膠原蛋白胜肽當成膳食補充品來促進頭髮生長，這在原本已經有的皮膚彈性與指甲強度證據上又加了一層。同一個成分，三個終點都有發表的資料撐著，所以我把 Vital Proteins Beauty Edition 拉到第三，功效分調到 9.0，總分 8.8。

Nutrafol Core for Women 續居第一，短期內我看不到會動的理由。它是這份榜單上唯一由醫師設計、而且針對它主打族群做過臨床觀察的配方，也就是 18 到 44 歲、有稀疏困擾的女性。一天四顆膠囊是實打實的承諾，價格也是榜上最高，所以 CP 值只給 7.6。除此之外的每一項，都撐得起第一名。

有個提醒值得再講一次：今年受訪的皮膚科醫師一直強調，高劑量生物素會干擾常見的檢驗數值，包含甲狀腺與肌鈣蛋白檢查。如果你在吃 5,000 或 10,000 微克的生物素產品，抽血前記得跟醫師講一聲。這也是我為什麼一直偏好劑量抓得合理的配方，實用性比標籤數字重要多了。

Thorne Biotin 8 依同一個邏輯移到第四，不過它 9.6 的檢驗分，讓它依然是想吃單一成分、要求驗證資料的人最穩的選擇。Hum Hair Sweet Hair 守住第二，因為軟糖劑型真的能讓人把整罐吃完。這類產品要連吃六個月才看得出成果，願意天天吃下去的劑型，本身就是效果的一部分。

highlights.title: Vital Proteins 升到第三
highlights.body: 功效分調升到 9.0，依據是 International Journal of Molecular Sciences 支持膠原蛋白胜肽促進頭髮生長的研究，加上原本就成立的皮膚彈性與指甲強度證據。

highlights.title: Nutrafol 靠臨床基礎守住第一
highlights.body: 醫師配方，並在主打族群，也就是 18 到 44 歲有稀疏困擾的女性身上做過研究。一天四顆與偏高價位讓 CP 值停在 7.6，其他每一項都撐得起冠軍。

highlights.title: 高劑量生物素記得先跟醫師說
highlights.body: 皮膚科醫師持續提醒，5,000 到 10,000 微克的生物素會干擾常見檢驗，包含甲狀腺與肌鈣蛋白數值。抽血前先講一聲，省得白跑一趟。

highlights.title: Thorne 是要驗證資料的人的選擇
highlights.body: 第三方檢驗 9.6，加上 CP 值 9.2，適合想吃單一成分、而且希望背後有完整檢驗報告的人。想單純補生物素的話，它最穩。

highlights.title: 吃得完比配方漂亮更重要
highlights.body: Hum Hair Sweet Hair 守在第二，很大一部分靠 9.2 的劑型分。這類產品要連吃六個月才看得出效果，而好吃的軟糖真的會被吃完。
